subcodes.first_line: O light of the spiritual ones' eyes! Though all eyes are weeping, and hearts are burning, and souls from this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نور حدقه دیده روحانیان اگر چه جمیع چشمها کریان و دلها سوزان و جگرها از این
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
